content.heading: The Group Selection Rule
content.body: One of, Everyone of, A group of, Either of, Each of, Each one of, A flock of, A pair of, A herd of तथा Neither of के बाद noun or pronoun 'Plural' तथा Verb 'Singular' आता है [cite: 12]। verb के बाद आने वाला pronoun हमेशा singular (his/her) आता है[cite: 12]!

variables: Selection Word: One of, Each of, Neither of, etc.
Noun/Pronoun: MUST be Plural (boxes, brothers, sources)
Verb: MUST be Singular (is, has, wants, writes)
Possessive Pronoun: MUST be Singular (his, her)

content.mnemonic: एक निकालने के लिए, एक से ज्यादा चाहिए!
content.explanation: इस नियम को आपको रटने की बिल्कुल भी जरूरत नहीं है [cite: 13]। ये नियम कह रहा है कि One of के बाद आने वाला 'noun/pronoun', plural आएगा और verb, 'singular आएगी [cite: 14]। अब आप देखिये अगर आपको One निकालना है तो आप one में से तो one निकाल नहीं सकते है [cite: 15, 27]। इसके लिए हमे one से ज्यादा की जरूरत है मतलब कि Plural Noun/Pronoun आएगा और हम बात One की कर रहे है तो Verb 'Singular' आएगी [cite: 28, 29, 30]।

content.message: Exam वाली गलती: एग्जाम में ज्यादातर Verb और Plural 'Noun /Pronoun' वाली करता है [cite: 34]। Examiner या तो Noun को Singular कर देगा, या Verb को Plural कर देगा।

examples: One of his brothers is a teacher. [cite: 36]
Everyone of the boys likes to ride. [cite: 37]
Either of them has forgotten his umbrella. [cite: 38]
Neither of his daughters is married. [cite: 39]
A group of my friends wants to visit the new plant. [cite: 40]
One of them has done his homework. [cite: 41]

content.wrong: Land revenue was one of the major source of income... [SSC MTS 2021] [cite: 47]
content.right: Land revenue was one of the major sources of income... (Source must be Plural)

content.wrong: One of my brothers write novels for leisure. [SSC MTS 2023] [cite: 22]
content.right: One of my brothers writes novels for leisure. (Write -> Writes because Verb must be Singular)

content.scenario: Question: One of these boxes have the portrait of the heiress. [cite: 17, 31]
content.analysis: देशी जुगाड़ Solution:- अब आप देखिये की हमे One box निकालना था तो एक से ज्यादा में से ही निकल पायेगा इसलिए यहां पर boxes [plural] है, अब verb देखिये have (plural) है जबकि हमने 'one box' की बात की है तो Verb 'Singular 'आनी चाहिए [cite: 32]।
content.conclusion: इसलिए यहां पर have की जगह singular verb 'has' आएगी [cite: 33]।
